name: cockpit
description: The process pack: pilot (phase detection, ultra-planning, review routing), grilling (brief-locking interviews), grill-with-docs (grilling + live ADRs/glossary), orchestrate (multi-agent task batches), handoff (logs, guides, delivery), diagnosing-bugs (repro-first debugging), and domain-modeling (glossary + ADRs). Harness-neutral: Claude Code native, Codex via AGENTS.md.
